name: Toolbar
description: Horizontal toolbar container with separator, spacer, and group sub-components.

api.name: Toolbar
api.description: Horizontal toolbar container with separator, spacer, and group sub-components.

examples.title: Basic Toolbar
examples.code:
<Toolbar>
    <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Ghost" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Sm">
        <Blazicon Svg="Lucide.Bold" class="h-4 w-4" />
    </Button>
    <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Ghost" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Sm">
        <Blazicon Svg="Lucide.Italic" class="h-4 w-4" />
    </Button>
    <ToolbarSeparator />
    <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Ghost" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Sm">
        <Blazicon Svg="Lucide.AlignLeft" class="h-4 w-4" />
    </Button>
</Toolbar>

examples.title: With Spacer and Groups
examples.code:
<Toolbar>
    <ToolbarGroup>
        <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Ghost" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Sm">Undo</Button>
        <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Ghost" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Sm">Redo</Button>
    </ToolbarGroup>
    <ToolbarSeparator />
    <ToolbarGroup>
        <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Ghost" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Sm">Bold</Button>
        <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Ghost" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Sm">Italic</Button>
    </ToolbarGroup>
    <ToolbarSpacer />
    <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Ghost" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Sm">Settings</Button>
</Toolbar>

mdSummary:
# Toolbar

Horizontal toolbar container with separator, spacer, and group sub-components.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Navigation
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/toolbar

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Toolbar | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Toolbar | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Toolbar | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| ToolbarGroup | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| ToolbarGroup | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| ToolbarGroup | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| ToolbarSeparator | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| ToolbarSeparator | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| ToolbarSpacer | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| ToolbarSpacer | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Toolbar) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (ToolbarGroup) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- `ToolbarGroup`, `ToolbarSeparator`, `ToolbarSpacer`

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Toolbar />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-border`, `--color-card`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Toolbar/Toolbar.razor`
- `UI/Toolbar/ToolbarGroup.razor`
- `UI/Toolbar/ToolbarSeparator.razor`
- `UI/Toolbar/ToolbarSpacer.razor`
